pattern: Follow a self-modifying walk over an instruction tape, accumulating on adds and teleporting on jumps, halting when stepping out of bounds or revisiting a node.
hints: The walk can branch around the tape, so you must remember which positions you have already executed.
Stop the moment the next index falls outside the array or points at a position you have already run.
Start at index zero with score zero; on add, add the value and advance by one; on jump, move by the value; mark visited positions and end on a revisit or out-of-bounds.

edge_inputs.description: mixed jumps and adds ending on a revisit
self loop jump of zero revisits immediately
negative jump goes out of bounds below zero

stress.description: long tape of random instructions and values
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    instr = [rng.choice(['add', 'jump']) for _ in range(n)]
    vals = [rng.randrange(-n, n + 1) for _ in range(n)]
    return [instr, vals]
